goals: Calculate future value of savings for agricultural technology investment
Compare multiple interest rate scenarios for farm investment planning
Calculate present value to determine if a technology loan is worthwhile
Determine appropriate product pricing using markup calculation

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and curious, approaches problems methodically but may need guidance on financial calculations. Focused on practical applications for rural agricultural contexts.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knowledgeable about agricultural technology adoption in rural communities but unfamiliar with financial calculation tools and APIs. Will need clear explanations of results.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations needed to evaluate technology investment options for agricultural practices in rural communities.
